How to Apply

All applications must be submitted through Lisle International’s official grant portal known as Submit.

Applications sent through any other method will not be considered.

Organizations should carefully review the eligibility requirements and preview application materials before beginning the submission process.

Contact Information

For questions regarding the grant program:

📧 office@lisleinternational.org

📍 Lisle International
539 W. Commerce St #1782
Dallas, TX 75208
United States

Apply Here 

Final Thoughts

The Lisle International Global Seed Grants 2026 present an outstanding opportunity for organizations dedicated to fostering intercultural understanding, international collaboration, and global citizenship.

With a supportive mentorship model, a transparent application process, and a commitment to empowering changemakers worldwide, the program offers more than funding—it provides a pathway for organizations to expand their impact and contribute to a more connected and understanding world.

Organizations with innovative projects are encouraged to prepare early and submit their Request to Apply before the application window closes.

For more information on this grant visit here 

Discover more grant opportunities on OFY here 

The post Lisle International Global Seed Grants 2026: Funding Opportunity for Intercultural Exchange and Global Citizenship Projects Worldwide appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.

item.title: Lilly Foundation Open Call 2026: Grant Funding for Global Health, STEM Education, and Economic Mobility Programs
item.dc:creator: Grace Amo
item.description:
The Eli Lilly and Company Foundation (Lilly Foundation) has officially launched its 2026 Open Call for Applications, providing funding opportunities for eligible charitable organizations working to improve health outcomes, strengthen education pathways, and expand economic opportunities for underserved communities. Through its annual charitable grants program, the Lilly Foundation supports nonprofit organizations whose missions align with […]

The post Lilly Foundation Open Call 2026: Grant Funding for Global Health, STEM Education, and Economic Mobility Programs appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.
item.content:encoded:
The Eli Lilly and Company Foundation (Lilly Foundation) has officially launched its 2026 Open Call for Applications, providing funding opportunities for eligible charitable organizations working to improve health outcomes, strengthen education pathways, and expand economic opportunities for underserved communities.

Through its annual charitable grants program, the Lilly Foundation supports nonprofit organizations whose missions align with its strategic focus areas of Global Health, K-12 STEM Education, and Economic Mobility. The Foundation seeks to fund impactful initiatives that address pressing social challenges while creating sustainable opportunities for individuals and communities to thrive.

Organizations with innovative programs that improve healthcare access, strengthen STEM learning pathways, or enhance workforce and economic opportunities are encouraged to submit a pre-application during the 2026 funding cycle.

About the Lilly Foundation

Established in 1968, the Eli Lilly and Company Foundation was created to extend the charitable reach and social impact of Eli Lilly and Company.

The Foundation operates as a tax-exempt private foundation and supports charitable initiatives that align with its philanthropic mission of improving lives and strengthening communities.

Through strategic grantmaking, the Foundation partners with organizations that demonstrate measurable impact, innovation, and long-term sustainability.

Lilly Foundation Open Call 2026

The Lilly Foundation’s 2026 Open Call provides grant funding to eligible charitable organizations involved in initiatives that align with one or more of the Foundation’s core focus areas.

The Foundation is particularly interested in supporting programs that deliver meaningful outcomes for underserved and low-income communities while promoting long-term social and economic progress.

Funding Focus Areas

1. Global Health

The Global Health focus area supports charitable organizations working to improve access to quality healthcare services in resource-limited settings.

The Foundation aims to address healthcare disparities by supporting organizations that:

  • Improve access to healthcare services
  • Bring healthcare closer to underserved populations
  • Strengthen healthcare delivery systems
  • Address barriers to treatment and care
  • Reduce the burden of non-communicable diseases (NCDs)
  • Improve health outcomes in vulnerable communities

Priority Areas

Particular priority may be given to charitable initiatives focused on:

  • Cardiometabolic health
  • Diabetes prevention and management
  • Obesity prevention
  • Cardiovascular health
  • Healthcare system strengthening
  • Community-based healthcare solutions

Geographic Scope

Programs may operate:

  • In the United States
  • In low-income countries
  • In lower-middle-income countries

Organizations implementing innovative healthcare solutions in underserved settings are especially encouraged to apply.

2. K-12 STEM Education

The Foundation is committed to expanding educational opportunities for students from low-income communities through investments in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics (STEM) education.

Program Objectives

Supported initiatives may focus on:

  • STEM learning opportunities
  • Educational equity
  • Academic enrichment
  • Career readiness
  • STEM mentorship programs
  • Teacher development
  • Science and technology engagement

Target Population

The Foundation prioritizes students from low-income communities, particularly during:

  • Middle school years
  • Critical educational transition periods

Geographic Focus

This funding area specifically supports programs serving:

📍 Marion County, Indiana, USA

3. Economic Mobility

The Economic Mobility focus area seeks to increase opportunities for long-term prosperity and community well-being.

The Foundation supports organizations delivering programs that strengthen economic opportunity and improve quality of life for underserved populations.

Key Areas of Support

Eligible programs may focus on:

Workforce Readiness

  • Skills training
  • Career preparation
  • Employment support services
  • Professional development

Postsecondary Education Pathways

  • College readiness
  • Vocational training
  • Technical education
  • Skills-based learning programs

Housing Stability

  • Housing support services
  • Community development initiatives
  • Programs promoting long-term stability

Geographic Focus

Funding under this category is directed toward organizations serving:

📍 Marion County, Indiana, USA

Additional Community Support Initiatives

Beyond the Open Call funding categories, the Lilly Foundation also contributes to community strengthening through:

Employee Giving Programs

Supporting charitable donations made by eligible Lilly employees.

Disaster Relief

Funding organizations involved in:

  • Emergency response
  • Humanitarian assistance
  • Recovery efforts

Community Development

Supporting initiatives that address urgent local needs and strengthen community resilience.

Who Can Apply?

Eligible applicants generally include:

  • Registered nonprofit organizations
  • Charitable organizations
  • Community-based organizations
  • Educational institutions
  • Foundations
  • Public charities
  • Organizations recognized under relevant charitable regulations

Applicants should demonstrate:

  • A clear charitable mission
  • Alignment with Lilly Foundation priorities
  • Strong organizational capacity
  • Measurable program outcomes
  • Sustainable implementation strategies

What Types of Projects May Be Competitive?

Organizations may be particularly competitive if they demonstrate:

Strong Community Impact

Programs that create measurable improvements in health, education, or economic outcomes.

Scalability

Solutions with the potential to expand and benefit larger populations.

Innovation

Creative approaches to addressing persistent social challenges.

Sustainability

Programs capable of generating long-term results beyond the grant period.

Equity and Inclusion

Initiatives designed to serve underserved and vulnerable populations.

Benefits of Receiving Lilly Foundation Funding

Successful organizations may benefit from:

  • Financial support for program implementation
  • Increased visibility and credibility
  • Opportunities to expand impact
  • Strengthened community partnerships
  • Enhanced capacity for growth and innovation

As one of the world’s leading corporate foundations, Lilly Foundation support can help organizations scale proven solutions and improve outcomes for communities in need.

Application Process

The 2026 Open Call utilizes a pre-application process.

Organizations interested in seeking funding should review the program guidelines and frequently asked questions before submitting their application.

Applicants are encouraged to ensure their proposed activities align closely with one of the Foundation’s designated funding priorities.

Apply Here 

Important Dates

Pre-Application Opens

📅 1 June 2026

Pre-Application Deadline

📅 3 July 2026

Organizations are encouraged to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid technical issues or last-minute complications.

Why Organizations Should Apply

The Lilly Foundation Open Call 2026 represents an important opportunity for nonprofit organizations working at the intersection of health, education, and economic opportunity.

With a strong emphasis on measurable impact, equity, and sustainable change, the Foundation seeks to partner with organizations that are creating lasting improvements in the lives of individuals and communities.

Whether your organization is expanding healthcare access in underserved regions, preparing young people for STEM careers, or helping families achieve economic stability, this funding opportunity may provide valuable support to advance your mission and amplify your impact.

For more information on this grant visit here 

Discover more grant opportunities on OFY on here 

The post Lilly Foundation Open Call 2026: Grant Funding for Global Health, STEM Education, and Economic Mobility Programs appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.

item.title: Moonshot Awards 2026 Applications Now Open for Young Changemakers Worldwide
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description:
Program Name: Moonshot Awards 2026 Organizer: Moonshot Platform Website: moonshotplatform.org/awards  Application Deadline: July 12, 2026, 11:59 PM Pacific Time Awards Ceremony: November 2026 in New York City, Application Link: https://moonshotplatform.submittable.com/submit/903f88da-45c2-44b0-a71e-39bedae6bb2b/moonshot-awards-2026   The Moonshot Awards are an annual global program celebrating young innovators, founders, artists, scientists, and advocates aged 15–30 who are building bold solutions to the world’s most urgent challenges. Free […]

The post Moonshot Awards 2026 Applications Now Open for Young Changemakers Worldwide appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.
item.content:encoded:
• Program Name: Moonshot Awards 2026
  • Organizer: Moonshot Platform
  • Website: moonshotplatform.org/awards 
  • Application Deadline: July 12, 2026, 11:59 PM Pacific Time
  • Awards Ceremony: November 2026 in New York City,
  • Application Link: https://moonshotplatform.submittable.com/submit/903f88da-45c2-44b0-a71e-39bedae6bb2b/moonshot-awards-2026

 

The Moonshot Awards are an annual global program celebrating young innovators, founders, artists, scientists, and advocates aged 15–30 who are building bold solutions to the world’s most urgent challenges. Free to apply and open to all nationalities. They serve as the entry point into the broader Moonshot ecosystem—a holistic, two-year journey that develops the person behind the work, not just the work itself.

Applications are accepted across 3 main categories: Idea, Start-Up, and Nonprofit, as well as 5 thematic categories: Learning, Health, Art for Humanity, Borderless, and AI for Good.

Eligibility Criteria

  • Age 15–30
  • Working on an impact-driven project, idea, venture, initiative, or creative practice
  • Contributing to at least one of the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) or working toward positive social, environmental, or systemic impact
  • Open to all nationalities, no restrictions
  • Free to apply
  • Individuals and teams both welcome

Applicants from underrepresented communities, the Global South, refugee and displaced populations, and indigenous communities are especially encouraged to apply.

 

Benefits

The Moonshot Awards are not just recognition; they are a gateway into a full ecosystem of support built around three pillars: Connect, Embody, and Create.

  • Equity-free grant funding to support and grow your work
  • Moonshot Young Leaders Camp: an immersive week-long leadership retreat in Prague and Ostrava, Czech Republic, bringing together young leaders and world-class mentors
  • Moonshot Youth Innovation Summit: a global gathering exploring bold ideas at the intersection of technology, democracy, and the future of humanity
  • Two-year acceleration program including mentorship, skill-building, and ongoing support (valued at $30,000 per leader)
  • Moonshot Impact Labs: online education covering organizational building, fundraising, storytelling, self-care, and more.
  • Moonshot Global Community: a lifelong network of young changemakers, mentors, investors, and supporters from across the world
  • Moonshot Access: opportunities to speak and be represented at leading global convenings and forums.
  • Funded trip to the Moonshot Awards Gala in New York City

 

Other Key Information

  • The top 100 shortlisted candidates, not just the winners, are welcomed into the Moonshot Global Community.
  • The top 20–25 finalists also enter the two-year acceleration program.
  • No travel or nationality restrictions. Grants are delivered regardless of whether the recipient can attend the ceremony.
  • Selection criteria focus on: personal connection to the problem, innovative yet accessible solutions, and meaningful potential for scalable impact
  • Much more ecosystem-forward now. The Awards feel like a door, not a destination.

APPLY HERE

For more information about this opportunity, visit here.

Discover more Global Award Opportunities on OFY here.

The post Moonshot Awards 2026 Applications Now Open for Young Changemakers Worldwide appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.
